summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. Six refs were hydrated enough to confirm open pull_request state and are kept independent because this shard has no shared canonical and merge/fix/close actions are blocked or unsupported by the partial PR hydration. Nineteen refs have unavailable live state from GitHub API rate limiting, so each is scoped to needs_human for refreshed hydration before any classification or mutation.
